name: users
description: User service specialist agent for workspace membership, staff, invitations, company profiles, roles, and groups inside Intera Inventory.

skills.name: Workspace Membership Visibility
skills.description: Inspect accessible companies, the active company profile, company staff, invitations, and membership state using the user-service MCP tools.
examples: List pending staff invitations for the active company.
Find a staff member in the current company.

skills.name: Workspace Access Admin
skills.description: Inspect roles, groups, and permission posture for staff and company access workflows.
examples: Show roles for the active company.
